nodes.name: Weekly Schedule
nodes.notes: Every Monday 08:00. Period + prior period are derived deterministically, not from now() in tested logic.

nodes.name: Fetch CRM KPIs
nodes.notes: Mirrors src/connectors.py source 'crm'. Swappable for Salesforce/Pipedrive.

nodes.name: Fetch Billing KPIs
nodes.notes: Mirrors src/connectors.py source 'billing'. Swappable for Chargebee/Recurly.

nodes.name: Fetch Analytics KPIs
nodes.notes: Mirrors src/connectors.py source 'analytics'. Swappable for Plausible/Mixpanel.

parameters.pythonCode:
# Mirrors src/transform.py + src/digest.py.
# Compare current vs prior period, flag big movers (|pct| >= 10%), render an ASCII digest.
current = items[0]['json'].get('current', {})
previous = items[0]['json'].get('previous', {})
names = {
    'new_leads': 'New Leads', 'qualified_leads': 'Qualified Leads',
    'mrr': 'MRR ($)', 'new_customers': 'New Customers', 'churned_customers': 'Churned Customers',
    'website_visits': 'Website Visits', 'signups': 'Signups'
}
lines = ['# Weekly Metrics Digest']
highlights = []
for key, name in names.items():
    if key not in current:
        continue
    cur = current[key]; prev = previous.get(key, 0)
    delta = cur - prev
    pct = None if prev == 0 else (delta / abs(prev) * 100)
    direction = 'up' if delta > 0 else ('down' if delta < 0 else 'flat')
    big = pct is not None and abs(pct) >= 10
    if big: highlights.append(name)
    pct_s = 'new' if pct is None else ('%+.1f%%' % pct)
    mark = '* ' if big else '  '
    lines.append('%s%s: %s (%+d, %s %s vs prior)' % (mark, name, cur, delta, pct_s, direction))
digest = '\n'.join(lines)
return [{'json': {'period': items[0]['json'].get('period'), 'digest': digest, 'highlights': highlights}}]

nodes.name: Deliver to Slack
nodes.notes: Idempotent in production: key delivery by period so a cron retry never re-posts the same digest.
